body: The iskender tray delivered at 6:20pm arrived below spec temperature. Jason called personally, replacement plate delivered 6:40pm. Documenting for QA.
Received. Reviewing now, will respond within 2 hours. — Derya
One baklava tray short on the 8pm dessert set. Yusuf drove second tray direct from Main Street, arrived 8:35pm.
Received. Reviewing now, will respond within 2 hours. — Jason
Bar reported 5 short on the kebab count. Verified against invoice — will credit 5% off next month's booking.
Received. Reviewing now, will respond within 2 hours. — Derya
Customer reports kaşarlı pide missing from delivery. Refund issued $14. Second pide dispatched free.
Received. Reviewing now, will respond within 2 hours. — Jason
Confirmed all meat sourced from Green Village Packing (halal-certified Pennsylvania slaughterhouse). No cross-contamination in kitchen.
Received. Reviewing now, will respond within 2 hours. — Derya
Confirmed 11:00am delivery, setup complete by 11:30. Signed off.
Received. Reviewing now, will respond within 2 hours. — Jason

Received. Reviewing now, will respond within 2 hours. — Derya

Received. Reviewing now, will respond within 2 hours. — Jason
